articles.title: VeChain Becomes UFC’s First Layer 1 Blockchain Partner
articles.description: The sponsorship reportedly is worth $100 million across a minimum of five-years agreement.

articles.title: New Allegations Surface Against Do Kwon, Did He Cash Out $2.7 Billion From Terra?
articles.description: FatManTerra has alleged that Do Kwon cashed out $2.7 billion from Terra within months, using Degenbox to drain liquidity from the ecosystem.

articles.title: Do Kwon dismisses allegation of cashing out $2.7B from LUNA, UST
articles.description: The rumor surfaced after a Twitter thread by FatManTerra shared the alleged details on how Kwon, along with Terra influencers, managed to drain funds while artificially maintaining the liquidity.
